description: Implement a Python web access log analysis library in the 'log_analyzer' project by completing the function stubs in the 'analyzer' package. The library must parse Apache Combined Log Format files, calculate traffic statistics (status code counts, top endpoints, and bandwidth), and detect brute-force security anomalies. The goal is to make all 17 existing tests pass. Required implementations include 'parse_log_line' and 'parse_log_file' in analyzer/parser.py, 'status_code_summary', 'top_endpoints', and 'bandwidth_by_endpoint' in analyzer/stats.py, and 'detect_brute_force' in analyzer/anomaly.py.
